name: 3jn-travel-os
description: 3JN Global Travel Operating System — say what you want, get a complete, transparently-priced travel package.
//deps: Runtime dependencies are declared HERE at the root on purpose: the root package.json is the deploy manifest for BOTH Vercel (api/index.js) and Firebase (functions source '.'). The workspaces above give each unit (shared/backend/frontend) its own package.json + boundary; the shared package is symlinked so backend can import '@3jn/shared'.
